overnight_hold_insights: Still zero overnight holds completed. The first live position (MPC) was evaluated at EOD and CLOSED before the bell: it failed two safe-hold gates — not profitable (close 268.14 < entry 269.65, -0.56%) and trailing stop never activated (price never reached the +1.5-ATR trail trigger ~269.98 on a very low-ATR name). Continue applying the config safe-hold criteria; the lesson so far is that very low-ATR, tight-stop entries that don't move within the session correctly get closed rather than carried.
